prompt:
Square 1:1 composition, TRANSPARENT background (full alpha outside shapes — no backdrop color, no gradient panel).

STYLE: Same as Neotoma homepage guarantee diagram cards — flat minimal shapes with heavily rounded corners and ends; friendly modern SaaS aesthetic; subtle fine paper or film grain on fills.

DUAL PALETTE: (1) STRUCTURAL — medium-to-bold rounded strokes in dark warm beige / taupe (#4a3d32 through #6b5845); neutral sand fills (#d4c4b0 through #e8ddd0) for secondary shapes. (2) ACCENT — the scene brief names exactly ONE accent color family. Use that hue boldly for focal nodes, highlighted connectors, key pipes or paths, and soft pastel tints of that hue. Do not add a second saturated accent (no red + blue together, etc.).

Geometry: rounded rectangles, circles, pills, arcs; dashed connector lines OK. Centered layout, generous margins.

FORBIDDEN: photorealism, scratchboard cross-hatching, black-and-white only heroes, text, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks.

Scene / metaphor: Operating across tools — continuity between sessions. A rounded bridge or gangway links two soft elevated platforms (two tools/worlds). Small rounded agent or hub nodes; dashed curved paths in SKY / CYAN ACCENT only: use #0ea5e9, #38bdf8, #7dd3fc, #e0f2fe for highlighted paths, nodes, and key fills. Beige taupe outlines for deck structure and supports.

AMBER / GOLD ACCENT only: #b45309, #d97706, #f59e0b, #fbbf24, #fef3c7 for lens rim highlight, bug body tint, warning accents. Beige for glass outline and neutral parts.
